cases.prompt: 이 사이트 QA 돌려서 버그 찾고 고쳐줘

assertions.text: Runs the QA workflow in one of the three tiers (Quick/Standard/Exhaustive), reporting critical/high bugs at minimum.
Iteratively fixes bugs in source code and commits each fix atomically, then re-verifies.
Reports before/after health scores and a ship-readiness summary.

cases.prompt: The checkout flow is ready, does this work? Test it and fix what's broken.

assertions.text: Systematically QA-tests the web application and surfaces bugs found with evidence.
Enters the test-fix-verify loop, fixing bugs in source rather than only reporting them.
Ends with a ship-readiness summary and fix evidence.
